summary: Test suite covers all main requirements (version parsing, bump logic, changelog generation, GitHub Actions integration) with clear test organization and proper bats usage. However, rigor is limited by missing edge cases: scoped commits (feat(scope):), empty commit lists, whitespace handling in version files, malformed commits, and large version numbers are untested. Design is good but has minor issues: temporary directories leak in act-pipeline tests (LAST_TMP not cleaned), some code duplication (VERSION file setup repeated), and workflow structure tests are superficial (grepping YAML rather than structural validation). The act-result.txt verification is present but the test doesn't thoroughly validate CHANGELOG.md content generation. Would catch most regressions in happy-path scenarios but some edge-case regressions could slip through.
